input: Create a portfolio gallery module. It should display project cards in a responsive grid with thumbnail image, title, description, tech tags, and links. Support filtering by tech tag and searching by title. Include a detail view showing full project description, multiple images in a lightbox carousel, and links to live demo and source code. Support sorting by date added or alphabetically.
hint: Grid layout via CSS Grid with auto-fill and minmax. Lightbox is a modal overlay with prev/next navigation. Tech tags rendered as pills with click-to-filter. Detail view triggered by card click. Image carousel tracks current index with wrap-around. MSS: contentType art, structure collection, boundary all (a portfolio is a public showcase — users share it with employers/clients, not private data), scale 2.

---
name: portfolio-gallery
description: Responsive portfolio gallery with project cards, filtering, search, sorting, and lightbox detail views
metadata:
  contentType: art
  structure: collection
  boundary: all
  scale: "2"
---

# Portfolio Gallery

A responsive portfolio gallery module for showcasing projects with rich card-based layouts.

## Features

- **Grid Display**: Responsive card grid with thumbnail, title, description, tech tags, and links
- **Filtering**: Filter projects by technology tag
- **Search**: Search projects by title
- **Sorting**: Sort by date added (newest/oldest) or alphabetically (A-Z/Z-A)
- **Detail View**: Full project page with expanded description, image lightbox carousel, and external links
- **Lightbox Carousel**: Navigate through multiple project images with prev/next controls

## Usage

### List all projects
Renders the gallery grid with all projects. Supports optional query parameters:
- `?tag=React` — filter by tech tag
- `?q=portfolio` — search by title
- `?sort=date-desc` — sort order (`date-desc`, `date-asc`, `alpha-asc`, `alpha-desc`)

### View project detail
Renders a full detail page for a single project by its slug, including the image lightbox carousel and links to live demo and source code.

### Data format
Projects are stored in `data/projects.json` as an array of objects with fields: `slug`, `title`, `description`, `summary`, `thumbnail`, `images`, `tags`, `demoUrl`, `sourceUrl`, `dateAdded`.

export type Project = {
  slug: string
  title: string
  summary: string
  description: string
  thumbnail: string
  images: string[]
  tags: string[]
  demoUrl: string
  sourceUrl: string
  dateAdded: string
}

export type SortOrder = 'date-desc' | 'date-asc' | 'alpha-asc' | 'alpha-desc'

export type GalleryQuery = {
  tag?: string
  q?: string
  sort?: SortOrder
}

[
  {
    "slug": "weather-dashboard",
    "title": "Weather Dashboard",
    "summary": "Real-time weather tracking app with interactive maps and 7-day forecasts.",
    "description": "A comprehensive weather dashboard built with React and TypeScript. Features include real-time weather data from OpenWeatherMap API, interactive map overlays showing precipitation and temperature, 7-day forecast views, location search with autocomplete, and saved favorite locations. The UI uses a clean card-based layout with smooth animations and responsive design that works on mobile and desktop.",
    "thumbnail": "/images/weather-dashboard-thumb.png",
    "images": [
      "/images/weather-dashboard-1.png",
      "/images/weather-dashboard-2.png",
      "/images/weather-dashboard-3.png"
    ],
    "tags": ["React", "TypeScript", "Leaflet", "REST API"],
    "demoUrl": "https://example.com/weather-demo",
    "sourceUrl": "https://github.com/example/weather-dashboard",
    "dateAdded": "2025-11-15"
  },
  {
    "slug": "task-flow",
    "title": "TaskFlow",
    "summary": "Kanban-style project management tool with drag-and-drop and real-time collaboration.",
    "description": "TaskFlow is a project management application inspired by Trello and Linear. Built with Svelte and a Bun backend, it supports drag-and-drop card management across customizable columns, real-time collaboration via WebSockets, file attachments, due date tracking with calendar integration, and Markdown-based card descriptions. The backend uses SQLite for persistence and supports team workspaces with role-based access.",
    "thumbnail": "/images/taskflow-thumb.png",
    "images": [
      "/images/taskflow-1.png",
      "/images/taskflow-2.png",
      "/images/taskflow-3.png",
      "/images/taskflow-4.png"
    ],
    "tags": ["Svelte", "Bun", "SQLite", "WebSocket"],
    "demoUrl": "https://example.com/taskflow-demo",
    "sourceUrl": "https://github.com/example/taskflow",
    "dateAdded": "2025-09-22"
  },
  {
    "slug": "pixel-art-editor",
    "title": "Pixel Art Editor",
    "summary": "Browser-based pixel art creation tool with layers, animation, and export options.",
    "description": "A feature-rich pixel art editor running entirely in the browser. Uses HTML Canvas for rendering with support for multiple layers, onion skinning for animation frames, a full color palette editor, and tools including pencil, eraser, fill bucket, line, and rectangle. Animations can be previewed in real-time and exported as GIF or sprite sheets. The editor supports undo/redo history up to 100 steps and projects can be saved to local storage or exported as PNG.",
    "thumbnail": "/images/pixel-editor-thumb.png",
    "images": [
      "/images/pixel-editor-1.png",
      "/images/pixel-editor-2.png"
    ],
    "tags": ["TypeScript", "Canvas API", "Web Workers"],
    "demoUrl": "https://example.com/pixel-editor",
    "sourceUrl": "https://github.com/example/pixel-art-editor",
    "dateAdded": "2026-01-08"
  },
  {
    "slug": "recipe-finder",
    "title": "Recipe Finder",
    "summary": "Search and discover recipes by ingredients, dietary preferences, and cuisine type.",
    "description": "Recipe Finder helps users discover meals based on ingredients they have on hand. Built with Next.js and powered by a custom recipe API, it features ingredient-based search, dietary filters (vegan, gluten-free, keto, etc.), cuisine type browsing, step-by-step cooking instructions with timers, shopping list generation, and the ability to save favorites. The UI is fully responsive with optimized image loading and smooth page transitions.",
    "thumbnail": "/images/recipe-finder-thumb.png",
    "images": [
      "/images/recipe-finder-1.png",
      "/images/recipe-finder-2.png",
      "/images/recipe-finder-3.png"

    "tags": ["Next.js", "React", "REST API", "PostgreSQL"],

  },
  {
    "slug": "markdown-notes",
    "title": "Markdown Notes",
    "summary": "Minimal note-taking app with live Markdown preview and cloud sync.",
    "description": "A distraction-free note-taking application with full Markdown support including syntax highlighting for code blocks, LaTeX math rendering, and Mermaid diagram support. Built with Vue 3 and Firebase, it features real-time cloud sync across devices, folder organization with nested categories, full-text search, dark and light themes, and keyboard shortcuts for power users. Notes can be exported as PDF or HTML.",
    "thumbnail": "/images/markdown-notes-thumb.png",
    "images": [
      "/images/markdown-notes-1.png",

  }
]

input.content:
---
name: portfolio-gallery
description: Responsive portfolio gallery with filterable project cards, search, sorting, and lightbox detail views
metadata:
  contentType: art
  structure: collection
  boundary: all
  scale: "2"
---

# Portfolio Gallery

A module for displaying portfolio projects in a responsive grid layout. Each project card shows a thumbnail image, title, description, tech tags, and links.

## Features

- **Grid View**: Responsive card grid with thumbnail, title, description, tech tags, and links
- **Filter by Tech Tag**: Click any tech tag to filter projects using that technology
- **Search by Title**: Real-time search to find projects by name
- **Sort**: Sort projects by date added (newest/oldest) or alphabetically (A-Z/Z-A)
- **Detail View**: Expanded view with full description, image carousel with lightbox, and links to live demo and source code

## Usage

### Adding a Project

Add entries to `data/projects.json` with the following shape:

```json
{
  "id": "my-project",
  "title": "My Project",
  "description": "Short description for the card",
  "fullDescription": "Longer description shown in the detail view",
  "thumbnail": "/images/my-project-thumb.jpg",
  "images": ["/images/my-project-1.jpg", "/images/my-project-2.jpg"],
  "tags": ["TypeScript", "React"],
  "demoUrl": "https://example.com",
  "sourceUrl": "https://github.com/user/repo",
  "dateAdded": "2026-01-15"
}
```

### Routes

- `GET /` — Gallery grid view with search, filter, and sort controls
- `GET /project/:id` — Detail view for a specific project
- `GET /api/projects` — JSON API with optional query params: `tag`, `search`, `sort`

export type Project = {
  id: string
  title: string
  description: string
  fullDescription: string
  thumbnail: string
  images: string[]
  tags: string[]
  demoUrl: string
  sourceUrl: string
  dateAdded: string
}

export type SortOption = 'date-desc' | 'date-asc' | 'alpha-asc' | 'alpha-desc'

export type GalleryFilters = {
  tag?: string
  search?: string
  sort: SortOption
}

[
  {
    "id": "weather-dashboard",
    "title": "Weather Dashboard",
    "description": "Real-time weather monitoring with interactive maps and forecast charts.",
    "fullDescription": "A comprehensive weather dashboard that pulls data from multiple APIs to display current conditions, 7-day forecasts, and historical weather patterns. Features interactive radar maps, air quality indices, and customizable alert thresholds for severe weather events.",

      "/images/weather-dashboard-1.jpg",

    "demoUrl": "https://example.com/weather",

    "dateAdded": "2026-03-01"
  },
  {
    "id": "task-flow",
    "title": "TaskFlow",
    "description": "Kanban-style project management with real-time collaboration.",
    "fullDescription": "A project management tool inspired by Trello and Linear, featuring drag-and-drop kanban boards, real-time multiplayer editing via WebSockets, sprint planning tools, and automated workflow triggers. Supports team workspaces with role-based access control.",
    "thumbnail": "/images/task-flow-thumb.jpg",
    "images": [
      "/images/task-flow-1.jpg",
      "/images/task-flow-2.jpg"
    ],
    "tags": ["TypeScript", "Vue", "WebSocket", "PostgreSQL"],

  },
  {
    "id": "pixel-art-editor",
    "title": "Pixel Art Editor",
    "description": "Browser-based pixel art creation tool with animation support.",
    "fullDescription": "A fully-featured pixel art editor running in the browser. Includes layers, onion skinning, palette management, and frame-by-frame animation with preview playback. Exports to PNG, GIF, and sprite sheets. Built with Canvas API for smooth 60fps rendering.",
    "thumbnail": "/images/pixel-art-thumb.jpg",
    "images": [
      "/images/pixel-art-1.jpg",

    "id": "recipe-vault",
    "title": "Recipe Vault",
    "description": "Smart recipe manager with nutritional analysis and meal planning.",
    "fullDescription": "A recipe management application with OCR-powered recipe import from photos, automatic nutritional breakdown, smart grocery list generation, and weekly meal planning. Integrates with dietary restriction profiles and supports scaling recipes for different serving sizes.",
    "thumbnail": "/images/recipe-vault-thumb.jpg",
    "images": [
      "/images/recipe-vault-1.jpg",
      "/images/recipe-vault-2.jpg"
    ],

  },
  {

    "fullDescription": "A browser-based audio synthesizer built on the Web Audio API. Features multiple oscillator types, ADSR envelope controls, effects chain (reverb, delay, distortion), MIDI controller support, and real-time waveform visualization. Includes a 16-step sequencer for pattern creation.",

    "dateAdded": "2026-02-28"
  }
]

export const colors = {
  bg: '#0f1117',
  surface: '#1a1d27',
  surfaceHover: '#242836',
  border: '#2a2e3a',
  text: '#e4e4e7',
  textMuted: '#9ca3af',
  accent: '#6366f1',
  accentHover: '#818cf8',
  accentSubtle: 'rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.12)',
  tag: '#22d3ee',
  tagBg: 'rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.1)',
  danger: '#ef4444',
  white: '#ffffff',
}

export const layoutStyles = {
  page: {
    'font-family': "'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif",
    'background-color': colors.bg,
    color: colors.text,
    'min-height': '100vh',
    margin: '0',
    padding: '0',
  },
  container: {
    'max-width': '1200px',
    margin: '0 auto',
    padding: '2rem 1.5rem',
  },
  header: {
    'text-align': 'center' as const,
    'margin-bottom': '2.5rem',
  },
  title: {
    'font-size': '2.25rem',
    'font-weight': '700',
    margin: '0 0 0.5rem 0',
    background: `linear-gradient(135deg, ${colors.accent}, ${colors.tag})`,
    '-webkit-background-clip': 'text',
    '-webkit-text-fill-color': 'transparent',
  },
  subtitle: {
    color: colors.textMuted,
    'font-size': '1rem',
    margin: '0',
  },
}

export const controlStyles = {
  bar: {
    display: 'flex',
    'flex-wrap': 'wrap' as const,
    gap: '0.75rem',
    'margin-bottom': '2rem',
    'align-items': 'center',
  },
  searchInput: {
    flex: '1 1 240px',
    padding: '0.625rem 1rem',
    'background-color': colors.surface,
    border: `1px solid ${colors.border}`,
    'border-radius': '8px',
    color: colors.text,
    'font-size': '0.875rem',
    outline: 'none',
  },
  select: {
    padding: '0.625rem 1rem',
    'background-color': colors.surface,
    border: `1px solid ${colors.border}`,
    'border-radius': '8px',
    color: colors.text,
    'font-size': '0.875rem',
    cursor: 'pointer',
    outline: 'none',
  },
  tagFilter: {
    display: 'inline-flex',
    padding: '0.375rem 0.75rem',
    'background-color': colors.tagBg,
    border: `1px solid transparent`,
    'border-radius': '999px',
    color: colors.tag,
    'font-size': '0.75rem',
    'font-weight': '500',
    cursor: 'pointer',
    transition: 'all 0.15s ease',
  },
  tagFilterActive: {
    'background-color': colors.tag,
    color: colors.bg,
  },
  clearBtn: {
    padding: '0.375rem 0.75rem',
    'background-color': 'transparent',
    border: `1px solid ${colors.border}`,
    'border-radius': '8px',
    color: colors.textMuted,
    'font-size': '0.75rem',
    cursor: 'pointer',
  },
}

export const gridStyles = {
  grid: {
    display: 'grid',
    'grid-template-columns': 'repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr))',
    gap: '1.5rem',
  },
  card: {
    'background-color': colors.surface,
    'border-radius': '12px',
    border: `1px solid ${colors.border}`,
    overflow: 'hidden',
    transition: 'transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease',
    cursor: 'pointer',
    'text-decoration': 'none',
    color: 'inherit',
    display: 'block',
  },
  thumbnail: {
    width: '100%',
    height: '200px',
    'object-fit': 'cover' as const,
    display: 'block',
    'background-color': colors.surfaceHover,
  },
  cardBody: {
    padding: '1.25rem',
  },
  cardTitle: {
    'font-size': '1.125rem',
    'font-weight': '600',
    margin: '0 0 0.5rem 0',
  },
  cardDesc: {
    color: colors.textMuted,
    'font-size': '0.875rem',
    'line-height': '1.5',
    margin: '0 0 1rem 0',
  },
  cardTags: {
    display: 'flex',
    'flex-wrap': 'wrap' as const,
    gap: '0.375rem',
    'margin-bottom': '1rem',
  },
  cardTag: {
    'font-size': '0.6875rem',
    padding: '0.25rem 0.5rem',
    'background-color': colors.tagBg,
    color: colors.tag,
    'border-radius': '4px',
    'font-weight': '500',
  },
  cardLinks: {
    display: 'flex',
    gap: '0.75rem',
  },
  cardLink: {
    'font-size': '0.8125rem',
    color: colors.accent,
    'text-decoration': 'none',
    'font-weight': '500',
  },
  emptyState: {
    'text-align': 'center' as const,
    padding: '4rem 1rem',
    color: colors.textMuted,
  },
}

export const detailStyles = {
  backLink: {
    display: 'inline-flex',
    'align-items': 'center',
    gap: '0.375rem',
    color: colors.accent,
    'text-decoration': 'none',
    'font-size': '0.875rem',
    'margin-bottom': '2rem',
  },
  hero: {
    position: 'relative' as const,
    'border-radius': '12px',
    overflow: 'hidden',
    'margin-bottom': '2rem',
    'background-color': colors.surface,
  },
  heroImage: {
    width: '100%',
    height: '400px',
    'object-fit': 'cover' as const,
    display: 'block',
  },
  carouselControls: {
    position: 'absolute' as const,
    top: '50%',
    left: '0',
    right: '0',
    transform: 'translateY(-50%)',
    display: 'flex',
    'justify-content': 'space-between',
    padding: '0 1rem',
    'pointer-events': 'none' as const,
  },
  carouselBtn: {
    width: '40px',
    height: '40px',
    'border-radius': '50%',
    'background-color': 'rgba(0,0,0,0.6)',
    color: colors.white,
    border: 'none',
    'font-size': '1.25rem',
    cursor: 'pointer',
    display: 'flex',
    'align-items': 'center',
    'justify-content': 'center',

export const styleToString = (style: Record<string, string>): string =>
  Object.entries(style)
    .map(([k, v]) => `${k}: ${v}`)
    .join('; ')

input.content:
---
name: portfolio-gallery
description: Responsive portfolio gallery with project cards, tag filtering, search, sorting, and lightbox detail views
metadata:
  contentType: art
  structure: collection
  boundary: all
  scale: "2"
---

# Portfolio Gallery

A module for showcasing project portfolios in a responsive card grid layout.

## Features

- **Grid View**: Responsive card grid with thumbnail, title, description, tech tags, and links
- **Filtering**: Filter projects by technology tag (e.g., React, TypeScript, Node.js)
- **Search**: Search projects by title with instant results
- **Sorting**: Sort projects by date added (newest/oldest) or alphabetically (A-Z/Z-A)
- **Detail View**: Expanded project view with full description, image lightbox carousel, and external links
- **Lightbox Carousel**: Navigate through multiple project images with prev/next controls

## Data Format

Projects are stored in `data/projects.json` as an array of project objects with fields:
- `id`: Unique identifier
- `title`: Project name
- `description`: Short summary for card view
- `fullDescription`: Extended description for detail view
- `thumbnail`: URL for card thumbnail image
- `images`: Array of image URLs for the lightbox carousel
- `tags`: Array of technology/category tags
- `demoUrl`: Link to live demo (optional)
- `sourceUrl`: Link to source code (optional)
- `dateAdded`: ISO date string for sorting

## Usage

- Browse projects in the grid view
- Click a tag to filter by that technology
- Use the search bar to find projects by title
- Use the sort dropdown to reorder projects
- Click a project card to open the detail view
- Navigate images in the lightbox carousel with arrow controls

export type Project = {
  id: string
  title: string
  description: string
  fullDescription: string
  thumbnail: string
  images: string[]
  tags: string[]
  demoUrl?: string
  sourceUrl?: string
  dateAdded: string
}

export type SortOption = 'date-desc' | 'date-asc' | 'alpha-asc' | 'alpha-desc'

export type GalleryFilters = {
  search: string
  tag: string | null
  sort: SortOption
}

The portfolio gallery module is ready. Here's what was created:

**Files:**
- `package.json` — Module config with `art` contentType, `collection` structure, `sort`/`filter` mechanics
- `skills/portfolio-gallery/SKILL.md` — Seed skill documentation
- `types.ts` — Types for `Project`, `SortOption`, `GalleryFilters`

- `store.ts` — Data layer: read/write projects, filtering, sorting, tag extraction
- `styles.ts` — Complete style definitions for grid, cards, controls, detail view, and lightbox carousel
- `render.ts` — UI rendering using plaited `h()` templates for gallery grid, detail view, and image carousel
- `routes.ts` — Route handlers with SSR, HTML wrapping, and client-side carousel JS
- `index.ts` — Bun server entry point with HTML and JSON API routes

**Features:**
- **Grid view** — Responsive card grid (`auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr)`) with thumbnail, title, description, tech tags, and links
- **Tag filtering** — Clickable tag pills; active tag highlighted in indigo
- **Title search** — Form-based search input with query param persistence
- **Sorting** — Dropdown: newest/oldest first, A-Z/Z-A
- **Detail view** — Full description, date, tags linking back to filtered gallery, demo/source links
- **Lightbox carousel** — Prev/next buttons, dot indicators, CSS transform sliding
- **JSON API** — `/api/projects` and `/api/projects/:id` endpoints
